submission_text: SQL debug assignment - PDF export. Task 1 prompt: find the bug in the provided query and fix it. Answer: the original draft effectively creates a cartesian join; use an explicit JOIN with ON orders.user_id = users.id. Task 2 prompt: describe one performance improvement. Answer: add an index on orders.user_id because the join is repeated in reporting queries. Comment: copied prompts often stay in the final submission PDF.

task_solutions.answer: Replace the cartesian join with an explicit JOIN on orders.user_id = users.id.
